title: Unique Party 55759 - 34" Giant Silver Foil Number 9 Balloon
features: • Large Number Balloon measures 34" (86cm) when fully inflated with air or helium (ships uninflated)
• Ideal for a 9th birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for a milestone birthday party or anniversary party
• Combine with latex balloons and curling ribbon to create a balloon bouquet or table decoration
• Coordinate with other silver birthday decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
